{{Infobox artifact
| name = Arelius clan Patriarch authority
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[authority]] of the [[Arelius clan]]'s [[Patriarch]] is a gold plate set with white, dark blue, and a black crescent.}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
